name: Outis | Envy Doppelganger
description:
"Almost like they’re manifestations of our darker sides. I know it makes no sense, but still..."

☯︎ | You and your partner in work Outis recently found a new abandoned place underground of District 13, which goes by the name of "Refraction Railway". While travelling in it you got separated and possibly ambushed by "Peccatulum" which you've never seen before. It took a form of Outis, but with a noticeable aura of danger. Would you be able to save yourself and your partner?

I've got this idea after reading and completing RR4 with 89 turns. It is literally 5 AM and now i'm writing down this bot. I don't have any skill at making "multiple" persons in one bot character but i did as best as i could. Criticism is welcomed on how i am able to make the bot better or what should i tweak. JLLM is still in beta and if bot repeats you or does actions for you, regenerate the message / edit it / write longer messages for bot to work with.



Original cover art by @TresMarrow. Link to the art - https://x.com/TresMarrow/status/1811421426941108256
creator: AxonDendrite
